events.title: US Military Strikes Iranian Missile Sites and Command Centers
events.desc: In response to recent attacks on oil tankers, the US military launched strikes against Iranian missile sites and command centers. Iran claims to have attacked US bases in retaliation.

events.title: US Strikes Threaten More Action Against Iran
events.desc: US President Trump stated that the US will "probably" strike Iran again, warning that any further actions would be swift. This escalation follows renewed hostilities after an interim agreement aimed at peace.

events.title: US Issues New Sanctions Against Iran Financier
events.desc: The US Treasury Department imposed new sanctions targeting Ali Ansari, a Dubai-based banker accused of financially supporting Iran's Revolutionary Guards and other entities, following Iran's resumed attacks in the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Iran Supreme Leader Vows Revenge for Father's Killing
events.desc: Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, pledged retaliation for the killing of his father and predecessor, Ali Khamenei, stating that vengeance is 'inevitable' and a 'demand of the nation'.

events.title: US lawmaker detained by Israeli settlers
events.desc: US Representative Ro Khanna reported being detained by armed Israeli settlers during a visit to the occupied West Bank. He criticized the settlers' actions and the Israeli army's perceived support for them.

events.title: US and Lebanese delegations discuss Israeli 'pilot zones' withdrawal
events.desc: Talks are underway between the US and Lebanese delegations concerning the withdrawal from two designated 'pilot zones' along the Israeli border, aiming to de-escalate tensions.

events.title: Headteacher killed in Israeli attack on Lebanon
events.desc: The deadliest Israeli attack on Lebanon since the latest ceasefire resulted in four fatalities, including a headteacher. The victims were traveling in a car after visiting family.

events.title: Palestinians mourn Gaza World Cup screenings organiser killed in Israeli strike
events.desc: Mohammed al-Wahidi, an aid worker and prominent humanitarian figure during the Israel-Hamas war, was killed in an Israeli strike in Gaza. He had organized World Cup screenings for the community.

events.title: Bomb explosions in Damascus during Macron's visit
events.desc: Several bomb explosions occurred in Damascus during French President Macron's visit. Syrian state television reported that President Assad welcomed Macron at the presidential palace.

events.title: Syrian Ex-Intelligence Chief Found Guilty of Torture
events.desc: A former Syrian intelligence chief has been found guilty of torture and sexual abuse by an Austrian court. This verdict follows a trial concerning alleged crimes against opponents of former Syrian leader Bashar al-Assad.

events.title: US seeks free Hormuz access from Iran
events.desc: The United States is pressing Iran for a public commitment to halt attacks in the Strait of Hormuz and ensure free, toll-free passage for all ships. Talks are ongoing, with the US aiming for a clear pledge on maritime security.

events.title: US insists Iran commit to stopping attacks in Hormuz strait
events.desc: Senior US officials are demanding Iran publicly state it will cease attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz and guarantee that all lanes remain open without tolls. Iran has historically resisted relinquishing control over the strategic waterway.

events.title: Iran hits back at Trump after truce declared over
events.desc: Iran maintained it had upheld its ceasefire commitments with the US, despite President Trump's declaration that the truce was over. This follows the recent signing of a memorandum of understanding aimed at peace.

events.title: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral
events.desc: Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new Supreme Leader, was absent from public view during his father's funeral ceremonies, fueling speculation about his health and safety following the attack that killed Ali Khamenei.

events.title: Iran nuclear and military damage revealed after restricted satellite images released
events.desc: Restricted satellite imagery has reportedly revealed damage to Iranian nuclear sites, ballistic missile infrastructure, and naval bases following recent military actions.
